Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-12 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker Today's data reveals two exceptional performers with notably different risk profiles. RCAT leads the rankings at score 98.6 with exceptionally consistent momentum across all timeframes (1-year return of 235%), perfect SMA alignment, and outstanding ratio consistency (5/5 passes), suggesting a steady uptrend with minimal volatility. TNGX ranks second with an extreme 1-year return of 820.5% but shows concerning irregularity—its ratio_1m_1w of 28.78 is dramatically outsized compared to other periods, indicating a sudden spike rather than sustained momentum, and its bad_spy_score of 8.26 is 2.5x higher than RCAT's 3.35, suggesting significantly higher dependence on market conditions. While both pass all SMA gates and hold 5/5 ratio passes, RCAT's smoother progression (ratios between 1.02-4.05) versus TNGX's extreme outlier (28.78) indicates RCAT demonstrates more reliable, repeatable short-term momentum characteristics that the dashboard appears designed to identify.
